text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Akikawa, the academy's diminutive director,
often lets her impulses get the better of her, but
her love and passion for Umamusume are second
to none.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She explains that she wants me to take part in the
URA Finale.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And to do that, I'll have to train
<chrname> enough to be a racer who
carries the hopes and dreams of many fans: a star
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our mission is clear: to win people's hearts and
gather all the fans we can!
